title: UAE gold prices drop by Dh4 after hitting weekly highs as Dubai rates slip below Dh570
summary_full: Gold prices in Dubai have dipped by approximately Dh4 per gram, with 24K gold now trading near Dh569-Dh570. This decline follows a recent surge and is attributed to easing geopolitical tensions and shifting investor sentiment globally. The correction presents a potential opportunity for buyers in the UAE's competitive gold market.
